creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jose G. Juanino from comment #2)
I need to push a bit because this is now six weeks old and my smoke tests seem to run fine on 12.1-RELEASE-pwhatever i386 and on amd64 with 13.0-RELEASE-pXX and 13.1-RELEASE-p1.

Please review my patch proposal; tarball's signature (WRT distinfo update) has been verified OK.
